notes: v1.3.58: Qwen 3.6 35B A3B support (text + VL + JANG + JANGTQ + MXFP4). New qwen3_5_moe_text inner text_config model_type registered in Python + UI. JANGTQ+VL now loads via jang_tools.load_jangtq_vlm fast path (P3/P15/P17/P18 Metal kernels) — no dequant, full quality. Live-verified 60/60 matrix cells + multi-turn + real image path at 52 tok/s on 35B A3B 2-bit. MiniMax-M2.7-JANGTQ on Mac Studio also uses fast path.
